query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'games' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%total%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%spread%' OR COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%ml%' LIMIT 20;
